The '''Commerce Guild corvette''' was a type of [[corvette]] utilized by the [[Commerce Guild]] and later the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems Navy|naval forces]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars]] against the [[Galactic Republic]]. In that [[time]], which saw the Guild side with the Confederacy, the corporation's [[Starship|corvettes]] were utilized alongside [[Commerce Guild bomber|Guild bombers]], [[Diamond-class cruiser|''Diamond''-class cruisers]] and [[Recusant-class light destroyer|''Recusant''-class light destroyers]] to defend<ref name="Rise" /> strategic<ref name="Separatist Ships">{{EncyclopediaCite|Republic and Separatist Ships (1)}}</ref> [[Planet|worlds]] located off the [[Perlemian Trade Route]], such as [[Castell]], [[Escarte]], [[Felucia]], [[Mooga]], and [[Minntooine]], which also served as sites for major Commerce Guild interests<ref name="Rise" /> as well as Separatist strongholds.<ref name="Separatist Ships" />

==Behind the scenes==
Commerce Guild corvettes were first mentioned in the new ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] in ''[[Rise of the Separatists]]'', a [[2019]] supplement to [[Fantasy Flight Games]]' series of ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying]]'' products.<ref name="Rise" /> In the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity, [[Commerce Guild corvette/Legends|Commerce Guild corvettes]] were introduced in ''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'', a [[2005]] novel authored by [[James Luceno]].<ref name="Labyrinth">''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]''</ref>
